report.summary: Drafted 5 new tweets + 1 institutional thread + 1 Discord/TG briefing + 1 newsletter addendum covering BTC $71K surge (Trump Iran postponement), Bitmine $138M ETH purchase, Resolv Labs $80M breach, Fear & Greed at 8 (Day 47), and Fed dissent signal. Created 2 SVG social cards (BTC $71K relief rally + Bitmine ETH accumulation). Updated content calendar v10 with 6 new posts through Mar 29.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet 22: Trump Iran postponement → BTC $71K surge (+5% intraday) — geopolitical catalyst with liquidation data and whale context
Tweet 23: Bitmine $138M ETH buy 4-part thread — Tom Lee's treasury firm thesis, 3rd consecutive weekly purchase, ETH ecosystem catalysts (Pectra, L2s)
Tweet 24: Resolv Labs breach warning — $80M unbacked USR minted via compromised key, security guide promotion
Tweet 25: Fear & Greed at 8 historical context — Day 47 extreme fear streak compared to Jan 2019 ($3.4K) and June 2022 ($17.6K) precedents
Tweet 26: Fed dissent rate cut signal — Miran voted 25bps cut, last comparable dissent preceded rate cuts within weeks
Discord/TG Tuesday morning briefing — comprehensive daily update covering $71K surge, institutional moves (MS + Bitmine), Resolv breach, F&G at 8
Newsletter v6 addendum #3 — flash moves (Iran relief + Bitmine), security watch (Resolv breach), fear data (Day 47 streak)
Content calendar v10 — 6 new posts added for Tue-Wed, shifted focus to recovery + institutions + security narratives

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: 2026-03-23-social-card-btc-71k-iran-relief.svg — 1200x630 OG card with mini price chart (drop → recovery), 3 stat cards (+5% rally, $400M liquidations, F&G 8), institutional context (whales 270K BTC, MS ETF, Bitmine), dark theme with green/red accent scheme

2026-03-23-social-card-bitmine-eth-accumulation.svg — 1200x630 OG card with 3-week purchase timeline visualization, ETH diamond icon, key stats (65,341 ETH / $138M / $2,100 price), ETH thesis points (Pectra, L2s, ratio reversion), purple/indigo accent scheme

sections.title: Analytics Insights
items: BTC surged 5% to $71,000 after Trump postponed Iran military strikes for 5 days — geopolitical relief rally
$400M in crypto futures liquidated (mostly longs) before recovery. Fear & Greed at 8 (Extreme Fear, Day 47)
Bitmine (Tom Lee) bought 65,341 ETH worth $138M — 3rd consecutive weekly purchase, betting crypto slump is ending
Morgan Stanley updated Bitcoin ETF application — $6.5T AUM firm filing during extreme fear
Resolv Labs breached: ~$80M unbacked USR minted via compromised private key — infrastructure security narrative
Fed held at 3.50%-3.75%, Stephen Miran dissented for 25bps cut — labor market weakness cited
Whale accumulation: 270K BTC in 30 days (13-year high). Exchange supply: 2.7M BTC (6-year low)
658 published pages live, 2 in publish queue. Deploy blocked 7 days by stale git locks
BTC historic losing streak watch: 6th consecutive monthly red close possible, matching Aug 2018-Jan 2019 record

Tue Mar 24: Trump Iran → BTC $71K (v13) + Morgan Stanley ETF thread (v12) + Bitmine ETH thread (v13) + Resolv breach warning (v13) + Tuesday briefing (Discord/TG) — ALL READY
Wed Mar 26: Fear & Greed at 8 historical (v13) + Fed dissent signal (v13) + CLARITY Act thread (v8) — ALL READY
Thu Mar 27: Weekly newsletter v6 with addendums 1-3 (Iran + MS + Bitmine + Resolv + Fear data) — DRAFT
Fri Mar 28: Engagement poll (recovery vs fake bounce) — PLANNED
Sat-Sun: Light market commentary — PLANNED

sections.title: Community Growth Notes
items: Shifted from geopolitical doom (v12 Iran crisis) to relief rally narrative — BTC $71K recovery is the lead story for Tue AM
Bitmine $138M ETH purchase adds a compelling institutional accumulation narrative alongside MS ETF filing — 'smart money buying while retail fears'
Resolv Labs breach enables promotion of Smart Contract Security Guide (newly built, in publish queue) — timely security content tie-in
Fear & Greed at 8 (Day 47) positions degen0x tools as essential during extreme sentiment — fear-greed-timeline and DCA calculator both promoted
Fed dissent content targets macro-aware crypto audience — rate cut signal narrative builds accumulation thesis
CRITICAL: Smart Contract Security Guide is in PUBLISH_QUEUE, not yet deployed. Resolv breach tweet links to it — will 404 until deploy. Recommend deploying before posting.
